title: What fMRI studies say about the nature of the psychedelic effect: a scoping review.

assets.abstract: Research on psychedelic drugs, such as psilocybin, LSD or DMT, is a burgeoning field, with an increasing number of studies showing their promise in treatment of mental disorders as well as examining their mechanism of action. Determining their effect on the brain is crucial from clinical standpoint, but also offers highly promising avenues of advancement in basic neuroscience-functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI) is one of the most useful techniques to do so, with a number of newly publis

phase_mapping.bridge_rationale: Liberation and enlightenment — ego dissolution, self-transcendence, psychedelic-induced mystical experience, spiritual awakening, enlightenment neuroscience.
